perturbation.original_text: Upon the execution of this Agreement, Go Call shall forward to PageMaster Corporation a deposit in the sum of $100,000.00 to secure the availability of 100,000 pagers to all Purchase Customers who prepay their annual airtime for this promotion. The deposit is non-refundable except as follows: a. PageMaster Corporation shall refund to Go Call, $1.00 per pager on all pagers delivered to Purchase Customers pursuant to this promotion (net return) up to the maximum refund of $100,000.00. b. On the last day of each month, the refund of Go Call's portion of the deposit shall be calculated by PageMaster Corporation for the &bbsp; prior month and will be forwarded to Go Call by check, along with an extended accounting of all pagers and customers until September 1, 2000, unless otherwise instructed by Go Call. Go Call, upon ten (10) days written notice, shall have the right to examine the books and records of PageMaster Corporation to verify the sales resulting from this promotion. Such examination shall be made at the regular place of business of PageMaster Corporation where such books and records are maintained during normal business hours and shall be conducted at Go Call's expense by a certified public accountant or other Go Call executive so designated by Go Call.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon the execution of this Agreement, Go Call shall forward to PageMaster Corporation a deposit in the sum of $100,000.00 to secure the availability of 100,000 pagers to all Purchase Customers who prepay their annual airtime for this promotion. The deposit is non-refundable under any circumstances.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specifies conditions under which the $100,000 deposit is refundable. The modified text states that the deposit is non-refundable under any circumstances. This is an explicit contradiction that creates uncertainty about whether Go Call can get any of its deposit back.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Upon the execution of this Agreement, Go Call shall forward to PageMaster Corporation a deposit in the sum of $100,000.00 to secure the availability of 100,000 pagers to all Purchase Customers who prepay their annual airtime for this promotion. The deposit is non-refundable under any circumstances.
perturbation.justification: The original text allowed for refunds of the deposit under specific conditions. The changed text explicitly states that the deposit is non-refundable under *any* circumstances. The contradicted text repeats the changed text that the deposit is non-refundable, thus solidifying the contradiction with the original agreement text. This creates a direct and irreconcilable contradiction, as the agreement cannot simultaneously allow and disallow refunds of the same deposit, thus fitting the 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: At least sixty (60) days prior to the commencement of the promotion, PageMaster Corporation in its sole discretion shall have the unconditional right to approve the accuracy of the description of the pager promotion and use of corporate logos and photographs and descriptions of products and services provided by designated airtime carriers or any third parties participating in the promotion; in the event of disapproval, Go Call shall not proceed with the promotion until the revised artwork or presentation is subsequently approved by PageMaster Corporation in writing.
perturbation.changed_text: At least sixty (60) days prior to the commencement of the promotion, PageMaster Corporation in its sole discretion shall have the unconditional right to approve the accuracy of the description of the pager promotion and use of corporate logos and photographs and descriptions of products and services provided by designated airtime carriers or any third parties participating in the promotion; however, Go Call may proceed with the promotion regardless of PageMaster Corporation's approval.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause gives PageMaster Corporation the right to approve promotional materials and prohibits Go Call from proceeding without this approval. The modified clause contradicts this by stating that Go Call may proceed regardless of PageMaster Corporation's approval. This creates a direct conflict in terms of approval rights and enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: At least sixty (60) days prior to the commencement of the promotion, PageMaster Corporation in its sole discretion shall have the unconditional right to approve the accuracy of the description of the pager promotion and use of corporate logos and photographs and descriptions of products and services provided by designated airtime carriers or any third parties participating in the promotion; however, Go Call may proceed with the promotion regardless of PageMaster Corporation's approval.
perturbation.justification: The original text gives PageMaster Corporation unconditional right to approve promotional materials, and Go Call cannot proceed without it. The changed text contradicts this by saying Go Call may proceed regardless of PageMaster Corporation's approval. The contradicted text (which is also the changed text in this instance) now directly conflicts with the original clause, creating a strong in-text contradiction as the approval is no longer mandatory.
